summary: Full E2E backend + frontend validation of StockAuto after GitHub import. Backend: 32/32 pytest tests passed covering public endpoints (categories, settings, vehicles list/detail with filters, dealers list/detail), auth (admin login + cookies, /me, logout, dealer register with pending status, duplicate email), dealer CRUD (profile update, create/edit/soft-delete vehicle, plan-limit enforcement implicit), admin moderation (users list, activate dealer, vehicles list, approve vehicle, notifications, settings get/update with PIX) and SEO (robots.txt, sitemap.xml). Frontend: home, /veiculos (12 cards + filters), vehicle detail (gallery + WhatsApp CTA), /revendedores (3 seed dealers), dealer profile, /login (admin login sets HttpOnly cookies, redirects to /admin showing ComingSoon as expected, header switches to ADM/SAIR, /api/auth/me=200), /cadastro (3 sections rendered). No critical bugs found.

issues: Document <title> is the default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'StockAuto' — bad for SEO/branding (update public/index.html and/or use react-helmet per route).

AuthContext fires GET /api/auth/me on every page load for unauthenticated visitors, producing 15+ noisy 401 entries in the browser console. Functional impact: none, but it clutters DevTools and shows up to monitoring. Suggestion: cache a 'no session' flag in memory or 401-swallow silently.

action_items: (Optional, low priority) Set proper <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html to 'StockAuto — Marketplace de Veículos' and add per-page titles.
(Optional, low priority) Silence /api/auth/me 401 noise for unauthenticated visitors in AuthContext.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 953 lines and mixes models, routes (auth/public/dealer/admin), storage helpers and seed in one file — should be split into modules (models.py, deps.py, routes/auth.py, routes/dealer.py, routes/admin.py, storage.py, seed.py) for maintainability.

set_auth_cookies uses samesite='none' with secure=True — correct for cross-site cookies behind ingress, but the comment 'access 24h' in create_token contradicts the spec note of '15min access'. Token actually lives 24h; either fix the spec or shorten the lifetime + add a /auth/refresh endpoint (currently absent — refresh_token cookie is set but never consumed).
No POST /api/auth/refresh endpoint exists despite refresh_token cookie being issued; once the access_token expires the user is forced to re-login.
list_dealers passes `featured` argument but never uses it; same for `featured` in list_vehicles. Either implement or remove from the signature.

admin_delete_user permanently deletes the user document but only soft-deletes their vehicles — orphan references remain in vehicle.dealer_id with no user to resolve in vehicle_with_dealer (dealer becomes null). Either soft-delete users too or cascade hard-delete.

dealer_create_vehicle counts active+pending against plan_ad_limit, but soft-deleted ones are correctly excluded — OK. However editing a vehicle resets status to 'pending' unconditionally; small UX problem if admin edits something they already approved.

Public route `/api/vehicles/{slug_or_id}` returns vehicles with status != 'deleted' — that means a 'pending' or 'blocked' ad is publicly viewable by direct slug. Should restrict to status='active' for unauthenticated requests.
No rate limiting on /auth/login, /auth/register — brute-force vulnerable.
EmailStr + bcrypt are fine, but password policy is only min_length=6 — weak.

robots.txt and sitemap.xml are mounted under /api which is non-standard; usually they sit at site root. Search engines won't find /api/robots.txt; frontend should proxy /robots.txt -> /api/robots.txt or backend should expose them at the root path.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all flows covered (Home, Listing, Detail, Dealers, Dealer Profile, Login+redirect+session, Register render)

test_credentials: admin@stockauto.com / Admin@123 (seeded). Dealer seed accounts: contato@autocentersilva.com, vendas@premiummotors.com, atendimento@garagemnacional.com — password Dealer@123. New dealers registered via /api/auth/register start status='pending' and need admin activation (PUT /api/admin/users/{id} {status:'active'}).
seed_data_creation: Test created one TEST_dealer_* (registered then activated then deleted in teardown); test vehicles created/deleted within the test run. Admin and seed data preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite is at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — covers 32 cases. Run: pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend routes /painel and /admin intentionally show ComingSoon — not a bug. WhatsApp CTAs are rendered on vehicle detail and dealer profile and use real numbers from seed dealers. Auth uses HttpOnly cookies, samesite=none; cross-origin works through ingress. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set in backend/.env so storage init succeeds (logs show 'Object storage initialized').
